title: thelypteris decipiens
intro: Thelypteris decipiens, also known as the False Maiden's Hair Fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris decipiens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
